import torch
import torch.nn as nn


class DKTModel(nn.Module):
    def __init__(self, num_skills: int, emb_dim: int = 128, hidden_dim: int = 256, num_layers: int = 1, dropout: float = 0.1, rnn_type: str = "gru"):
        super().__init__()
        self.num_skills = int(num_skills)
        self.emb_dim = int(emb_dim)
        self.hidden_dim = int(hidden_dim)
        self.num_layers = int(num_layers)
        self.dropout = float(dropout)
        self.rnn_type = str(rnn_type).lower()
        self.embedding = nn.Embedding(2 * self.num_skills, self.emb_dim)
        rnn_cls = nn.LSTM if self.rnn_type == "lstm" else nn.GRU
        self.rnn = rnn_cls(
            input_size=self.emb_dim,
            hidden_size=self.hidden_dim,
            num_layers=self.num_layers,
            batch_first=True,
            dropout=self.dropout if self.num_layers > 1 else 0.0,
        )
        self.drop = nn.Dropout(self.dropout)
        self.out = nn.Linear(self.hidden_dim, self.num_skills)

    def forward(self, skill_ids: torch.Tensor, corrects: torch.Tensor) -> torch.Tensor:
        x = skill_ids.long() * 2 + corrects.long().clamp(0, 1)
        emb = self.embedding(x)
        h, _ = self.rnn(emb)
        h = self.drop(h)
        return self.out(h)

    def config(self):
        return {
            "num_skills": self.num_skills,
            "emb_dim": self.emb_dim,
            "hidden_dim": self.hidden_dim,
            "num_layers": self.num_layers,
            "dropout": self.dropout,
            "rnn_type": self.rnn_type,
        }
